## 6. Summary

The Socratic AI Tutor project scaffolding is **complete**. All components are in place:

- **41 agent files** (.claude/agents/): 17 target + 20 builder + 3 existing + 1 manifest
- **15 command files** (.claude/commands/): 9 target + 4 builder + 2 existing
- **23 JSON schema files** (data/socratic/schemas/): All valid JSON, draft-07, with trace markers
- **2 SOT files** (data/socratic/): state.yaml + learner-state.yaml, both non-empty
- **12 data directories** (data/socratic/): All present with .gitkeep files
- **3 skill files** (.claude/skills/socratic-tutor/): SKILL.md + 2 references

The project is ready for Step 13 (Sub-Agent Implementation) to proceed with agent logic implementation using these schemas as the data contract.
